creator: vhaisman@gmail.com
text:
The manual pages hosted by freebsd.org for HP-UX seem somehow mangled/broken. E.g., <http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=setsockopt&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=HP-UX+11.22&arch=default&format=html>. This page does not contain any of the useful information like function signatures and types. Also later in the text of the page there is this:

	      boolean ) 	       Returns a non-zero value if socket lis-
				       tening is enabled, otherwise returns  a
				       zero value.

This makes no sense at all.

Fix: 

Wish I knew.
How-To-Repeat: Visit pretty much any HP-UX man page.
